title: Japanese Shrimp Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with shrimp, noodles, and Japanese-inspired flavors.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the Japanese noodles and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly browned.
Return the cooked shrimp to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce and sesame oil.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Stir in the chopped green onions and serve hot.
